message.content:
Read these files completely and report their full content:

1. D:\frontend\bcm-website\src\pages\Bia\BiaCreationWizard\components\RecordActivity\components\ResourceRequirements\StaffRequirementSection.tsx
2. D:\frontend\bcm-website\src\pages\Bia\BiaCreationWizard\components\RecordActivity\components\ResourceRequirements\ApplicationRequirementSection.tsx
3. D:\frontend\bcm-website\src\pages\Bia\BiaCreationWizard\components\RecordActivity\components\ResourceRequirements\ResumptionBandInputs.tsx
4. D:\frontend\bcm-website\src\pages\Bia\BiaCreationWizard\components\RecordActivity\components\ResourceRequirements\helpers.ts

Report the complete file content for each file with line numbers. Also note whether there is an `index.less` or any CSS module file in the ResourceRequirements directory.

Search depth: very thorough

attachment.content:
- brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
- frontend-design: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- frontend-design:frontend-design
- anthropic-skills:consolidate-memory
- anthropic-skills:docx
- anthropic-skills:pdf: Use this skill whenever the user wants to do anything with PDF files. This includes reading or extracting text/tables from PDFs, combining or merging multiple PDFs into one, splitting PDFs apart, rotating pages, adding watermarks, creating new PDFs, filling PDF forms, encrypting/decrypting PDFs, extracting images, and OCR on scanned PDFs to make them searchable. If the user mentions a .pdf file or asks to produce one, use this skill.
- anthropic-skills:pptx
- anthropic-skills:release-note-generator
- anthropic-skills:schedule
- anthropic-skills:setup-cowork: Guided Cowork setup — install role-matched plugins, connect your tools, try a skill.
- anthropic-skills:skill-creator
- anthropic-skills:xlsx: Use this skill any time a spreadsheet file is the primary input or output. This means any task where the user wants to: open, read, edit, or fix an existing .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv file (e.g., adding columns, computing formulas, formatting, charting, cleaning messy data); create a new spreadsheet from scratch or from other data sources; or convert between tabular file formats. Trigger especially when the user references a spreadsheet file by name or path — even casually (like "the xlsx in my downloads") — and wants something done to it or produced from it. Also trigger for cleaning or restructuring messy tabular data files (malformed rows, misplaced headers, junk data) into proper spreadsheets. The deliverable must be a spreadsheet file. Do NOT trigger when the primary deliverable is a Word document, HTML report, standalone Python script, database pipeline, or Google Sheets API integration, even if tabular data is involved.
- superpowers:brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
- superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents
- superpowers:executing-plans
- superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch
- superpowers:receiving-code-review
- superpowers:requesting-code-review
- superpowers:subagent-driven-development: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session
- superpowers:systematic-debugging
- superpowers:test-driven-development
- superpowers:using-git-worktrees
- superpowers:using-superpowers
- superpowers:verification-before-completion
- superpowers:writing-plans: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code
- superpowers:writing-skills
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review
- security-review

1 import './index.less' 2 import { Form, Grid, Input, InputNumber, Link } from '@arco-design/web-react' 3 import { IconDelete, IconPlus } from '@arco-design/web-react/icon' 4 import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next' 5 import { MaxLengthEnum } from '@common/constants/maxLength' 6 import ResumptionBandInputs from './ResumptionBandInputs' 7 8 const FormItem = Form.Item 9 const Row = Grid.Row 10 const Col = Grid.Col 11 12 type StaffRequirementSectionProps = { 13 list: Array<{ uuid: string }> 14 onAdd: () => void 15 onDelete: (uuid: string) => void 16 } 17 18 const StaffRequirementSection = ({ 19 list, 20 onAdd, 21 onDelete, 22 }: StaffRequirementSectionProps) => { 23 const { t } = useTranslation(['biaRecord', 'common']) 24 25 return ( 26

1 import './index.less' 2 import { Form, Grid, Input, InputNumber, Link, Select } from '@arco-design/web-react' 3 import { IconDelete, IconPlus } from '@arco-design/web-react/icon' 4 import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next' 5 import { MaxLengthEnum } from '@common/constants/maxLength' 6 import ResumptionBandInputs from './ResumptionBandInputs' 7 import { BAND_LABELS } from './helpers' 8 9 const FormItem = Form.Item 10 const Row = Grid.Row 11 const Col = Grid.Col 12 const TextArea = Input.TextArea 13 const Option = Select.Option 14 15 type ApplicationRequirementSectionProps = { 16 list: Array<{ uuid: string }> 17 onAdd: () => void 18 onDelete: (uuid: string) => void 19 applicationOptions: Array<{ label: string; value: any }> 20 /** 所属活动的 RTO 展示值（只读，自动） */ 21 rtoValue: string 22 } 23 24 const ApplicationRequirementSection = ({ 25 list, 26 onAdd, 27 onDelete, 28 applicationOptions, 29 rtoValue, 30 }: ApplicationRequirementSectionProps) => { 31 const { t } = useTranslation(['biaRecord', 'common']) 32 33 const autoMark = ( 34 {t('biaRecord:activityForm.form2.auto')} 35 ) 36 37 return ( 38
39
40 41 {t('biaRecord:resourceRequirement.applicationRequirement')} 42 43 } 46 onClick={onAdd} 47 > 48 {t('biaRecord:resourceRequirement.addApplicationRequirement')} 49 50
51 52 {list.map((item, index) => ( 53
54
55 56 {t('biaRecord:resourceRequirement.applicationRequirementNumber', { 57 index: index + 1, 58 })} 59 60 onDelete(item.uuid)} 64 /> 65
66 67 68 75

1 import { Form, InputNumber } from '@arco-design/web-react' 2 import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next' 3 import { BAND_FIELDS, BAND_LABELS } from './helpers' 4 5 const FormItem = Form.Item 6 7 type ResumptionBandInputsProps = { 8 /** 字段前缀，例如 `staffBO[0]` */ 9 fieldPrefix: string 10 /** 分组标题（恢复期最少需求） */ 11 groupLabel: string 12 required?: boolean 13 } 14 15 /** 16 * 恢复期时间档输入（0-4H / 4-8H / 8H-48H / 2D-7D / 7D-14D），5 个整数输入排成一行。 17 * 仅在分组标题上展示必填星号，单个档位不重复展示星号（与高保真一致）。 18 */ 19 const ResumptionBandInputs = ({ 20 fieldPrefix, 21 groupLabel, 22 required = true, 23 }: ResumptionBandInputsProps) => { 24 const { t } = useTranslation(['common']) 25 26 return ( 27
28
29 {required && *} 30 {groupLabel} 31
32
33 {BAND_LABELS.map((band, i) => ( 34 46 51 52 ))} 53
54
55 ) 56 } 57 58 export default ResumptionBandInputs 59

1	import { RESUMPTION_BANDS } from '@common/components/ActivityResourceModals'
2	
3	/**
4	 * 表单内部用的恢复期时间档字段名（与 RESUMPTION_BANDS / 时间档 code 一一对应）。
5	 * band0..band4 ↔ code 1..5
6	 */
7	export const BAND_FIELDS = ['band0', 'band1', 'band2', 'band3', 'band4']
8	
9	/** 表单中展示的档位文案（小写，与 BIA 影响表风格一致） */
10	export const BAND_LABELS = ['0-4h', '4-8h', '8-48h', '2d-7d', '7d-14d']
11	
12	/** 表单项里的 band0..band4 → 后端 resumption [{ code:1~5, value }] */
13	export const bandsToResumptionArray = (item: any) =>
14	  RESUMPTION_BANDS.map((_band, i) => ({
15	    code: i + 1,
16	    value: item?.[BAND_FIELDS[i]],
17	  }))
18	
19	/** 后端 resumption [{ code, value }] → 表单项里的 band0..band4 */
20	export const resumptionArrayToBands = (arr: any[] = []) => {
21	  const out: Record<string, any> = {}
22	  ;(arr || []).forEach((item) => {
23	    const idx = Number(item?.code) - 1
24	    if (idx >= 0 && idx < BAND_FIELDS.length) {
25	      out[BAND_FIELDS[idx]] = item?.value
26	    }
27	  })
28	  return out
29	}
30	
31	/* ----------------------------- 保存：表单 → 后端 ----------------------------- */
32	
33	export const buildStaffPayload = (staffBO: any[] = []) =>
34	  staffBO.map((item) => ({
35	    personnelDesignation: item?.personnelDesignation,
36	    personnelDesignationAr: item?.personnelDesignationAr,
37	    keyResponsibility: item?.keyResponsibility,
38	    keyResponsibilityAr: item?.keyResponsibilityAr,
39	    minPersonnelBau: item?.minPersonnelBau,
40	    resumption: bandsToResumptionArray(item),
41	  }))
42	
43	export const buildApplicationPayload = (applicationBO: any[] = []) =>
44	  applicationBO.map((item) => ({
45	    // 表单里 applicationName 存的是所选应用的 configId
46	    applicationConfigId: item?.applicationName,
47	    purpose: item?.purpose,
48	    purposeAr: item?.purposeAr,
49	    numberOfUsers: item?.numberOfUsers,
50	    noOfLicenses: item?.numberOfLicenses,
51	    // RTO 不提交（只读，后端取所属活动 RTO）
52	    rpo: item?.rpo,
53	    resumption: bandsToResumptionArray(item),
54	  }))
55	
56	export const buildITInfrastructurePayload = (itInfraBO: any[] = []) =>
57	  itInfraBO.map((item) => ({
58	    details: item?.details,
59	    detailsAr: item?.detailsAr,
60	    instructions: item?.instructions,
61	    instructionsAr: item?.instructionsAr,
62	    countRequired: item?.countRequired,
63	    alreadyPossess: item?.alreadyPossess,
64	    // newPurchase 不提交，由后端计算
65	  }))
66	
67	/* ----------------------------- 加载：后端 → 表单 ----------------------------- */
68	
69	export const loadStaffForm = (list: any[] = []) =>
70	  list.map((item) => ({
71	    personnelDesignation: item?.personnelDesignation,
72	    personnelDesignationAr: item?.personnelDesignationAr,
73	    keyResponsibility: item?.keyResponsibility,
74	    keyResponsibilityAr: item?.keyResponsibilityAr,
75	    minPersonnelBau: item?.minPersonnelBau,
76	    ...resumptionArrayToBands(item?.resumption),
77	  }))
78	
79	export const loadApplicationForm = (list: any[] = []) =>
80	  list.map((item) => ({
81	    applicationName: item?.applicationConfigId,
82	    purpose: item?.purpose,
83	    purposeAr: item?.purposeAr,
84	    numberOfUsers: item?.numberOfUsers,
85	    numberOfLicenses: item?.noOfLicenses,
86	    rpo: item?.rpo,
87	    ...resumptionArrayToBands(item?.resumption),
88	  }))
89	
90	export const loadITInfrastructureForm = (list: any[] = []) =>
91	  list.map((item) => ({
92	    details: item?.details,
93	    detailsAr: item?.detailsAr,
94	    instructions: item?.instructions,
95	    instructionsAr: item?.instructionsAr,
96	    countRequired: item?.countRequired,
97	    alreadyPossess: item?.alreadyPossess,
98	  }))
99
